div.h3: Elige tu postre según el número de personas

b:if.cond: data:blog.pageType == "index" and not data:view.isHomepage and data:blog.searchLabel

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

  if (!window.location.href.includes("/search/label/Destacados")) return;

  var grid = document.querySelector(".post-grid");
  if (!grid) return;

  var cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(
    grid.querySelectorAll(".post-card")
  );

  if (cards.length <= 6) return;

  /* MEZCLA ALEATORIA */
  for (var i = cards.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    var j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    var temp = cards[i];
    cards[i] = cards[j];
    cards[j] = temp;
  }

  /* LIMPIAMOS EL GRID */
  while (grid.firstChild) {
    grid.removeChild(grid.firstChild);
  }

  /* INSERTAMOS SOLO 6 */
  for (var k = 0; k < 6; k++) {
    grid.appendChild(cards[k]);
  }

});
</script>
